name: Darkvision
description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

name: Superior Darkvision
description: You can see in dim light within 120 feet as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

name: Fey Ancestry
description: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.

name: Keen Senses
description: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

name: Trance
description: Elves meditate deeply instead of sleeping.

name: Elf Weapon Training
description: You have proficiency with the longsword, shortsword, shortbow, and longbow.

name: Cantrip
description: You know one cantrip of your choice from the wizard spell list.

name: Extra Language
description: You can speak, read, and write one extra language of your choice.

name: Fleet of Foot
description: Your base walking speed increases to 35 feet.

name: Mask of the Wild
description: You can attempt to hide even when only lightly obscured by natural phenomena.

name: Drow Magic
description: Your drow heritage grants you innate spellcasting.

name: Drow Weapon Training
description: You have proficiency with rapiers, shortswords, and hand crossbows.

name: Sunlight Sensitivity
description: You have disadvantage on attack rolls and Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight when you or your target are in direct sunlight.

name: Dwarven Resilience
description: You have advantage on saving throws against poison, and you have resistance against poison damage.

name: Dwarven Combat Training
description: You have proficiency with the battleaxe, handaxe, light hammer, and warhammer.

name: Tool Proficiency
description: You gain proficiency with one type of artisan's tools of your choice.

name: Stonecunning
description: You have expertise on Intelligence (History) checks related to the origin of stonework.

name: Dwarven Toughness
description: Your hit point maximum increases by 1, and it increases by 1 whenever you gain a level.

name: Dwarven Armor Training
description: You have proficiency with light and medium armor.

name: Lucky
description: When you roll a 1 on an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can reroll the die.

name: Brave
description: You have advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

name: Halfling Nimbleness
description: You can move through the space of any creature that is of a size larger than yours.

name: Naturally Stealthy
description: You can attempt to hide even when obscured only by a creature at least one size larger than you.

name: Stout Resilience
description: You have advantage on saving throws against poison, and you have resistance against poison damage.

name: Draconic Ancestry
description: Choose a type of dragon. Your choice determines your Breath Weapon and Damage Resistance traits.

name: Breath Weapon
description: You can use your action to exhale destructive energy determined by your draconic ancestry.

name: Damage Resistance
description: You have resistance to the damage type associated with your draconic ancestry.

name: Black Draconic Ancestry
description: Black dragon ancestry grants an acid breath weapon and acid resistance.

name: Blue Draconic Ancestry
description: Blue dragon ancestry grants a lightning breath weapon and lightning resistance.

name: Brass Draconic Ancestry
description: Brass dragon ancestry grants a fire breath weapon and fire resistance.

name: Bronze Draconic Ancestry
description: Bronze dragon ancestry grants a lightning breath weapon and lightning resistance.

name: Copper Draconic Ancestry
description: Copper dragon ancestry grants an acid breath weapon and acid resistance.

name: Gold Draconic Ancestry
description: Gold dragon ancestry grants a fire breath weapon and fire resistance.

name: Green Draconic Ancestry
description: Green dragon ancestry grants a poison breath weapon and poison resistance.

name: Red Draconic Ancestry
description: Red dragon ancestry grants a fire breath weapon and fire resistance.

name: Silver Draconic Ancestry
description: Silver dragon ancestry grants a cold breath weapon and cold resistance.

name: White Draconic Ancestry
description: White dragon ancestry grants a cold breath weapon and cold resistance.

name: Gnome Cunning
description: You have advantage on all Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws against magic.

name: Natural Illusionist
description: You know the Minor Illusion cantrip. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for it.

name: Speak with Small Beasts
description: You can communicate simple ideas with Small or smaller beasts.

name: Artificer's Lore
description: Add twice your proficiency bonus to Intelligence (History) checks related to magic items, alchemical objects, or technological devices.

name: Tinker
description: You have proficiency with artisan's tools and can construct Tiny clockwork devices.

name: Skill Versatility
description: You gain proficiency in two skills of your choice.

name: Menacing
description: You gain proficiency in the Intimidation skill.

name: Relentless Endurance
description: When you are reduced to 0 hit points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 hit point instead once per long rest.

name: Savage Attacks
description: When you score a critical hit with a melee weapon attack, roll one additional weapon damage die.

name: Hellish Resistance
description: You have resistance to fire damage.

name: Infernal Legacy
description: Your infernal heritage grants you innate spellcasting.

name: Celestial Resistance
description: You have resistance to necrotic damage and radiant damage.

name: Healing Hands
description: As an action, you can restore hit points to a creature equal to your level once per long rest.

name: Light Bearer
description: You know the Light cantrip. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it.

name: Radiant Soul
description: You can unleash your celestial power, gaining a flying speed and dealing extra radiant damage once per turn.

name: Radiant Consumption
description: You radiate searing divine energy that damages nearby creatures and empowers your attacks.

name: Necrotic Shroud
description: You transform to frighten nearby creatures while empowering your attacks with necrotic energy.

name: Firbolg Magic
description: Your connection to nature grants you innate spellcasting.

name: Hidden Step
description: You can magically turn invisible until the start of your next turn or until you attack, deal damage, or force a saving throw.

name: Powerful Build
description: You count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.

name: Speech of Beast and Leaf
description: You can communicate simple ideas with beasts and plants.

name: Natural Athlete
description: You have proficiency in the Athletics skill.

name: Stone's Endurance
description: You can use your reaction to reduce damage taken once per short or long rest.

name: Mountain Born
description: You are acclimated to high altitude and naturally adapted to cold climates.

name: Expert Forgery
description: You have advantage on checks made to produce forgeries or duplicates of existing objects.

name: Kenku Training
description: Gain proficiency in two skills of your choice from Acrobatics, Deception, Stealth, and Sleight of Hand.

name: Mimicry
description: You can mimic sounds you have heard, including voices.

name: Bite
description: Your fanged maw is a natural weapon.

name: Cunning Artisan
description: You can craft simple weapons or shields from the remains of slain creatures.

name: Hold Breath
description: You can hold your breath for up to 15 minutes at a time.

name: Hungry Jaws
description: You can make a special bite attack that grants temporary hit points once per short or long rest.

name: Natural Armor
description: Your tough scales provide a base Armor Class of 13 + your Dexterity modifier.

name: Nature's Intuition
description: Gain proficiency in two skills of your choice from Animal Handling, Nature, Perception, Stealth, and Survival.

name: Feline Agility
description: Your reflexes and agility allow you to move with a burst of speed.

name: Cat's Claws
description: Your claws are natural weapons, and you gain a climbing speed of 20 feet.

name: Cat's Talent
description: You have proficiency in the Perception and Stealth skills.

name: Amphibious
description: You can breathe air and water.

name: Control Air and Water
description: You know the Fog Cloud spell and gain additional innate spells as you gain levels.

name: Emissary of the Sea
description: You can communicate simple ideas with beasts that have an innate swimming speed.

name: Guardians of the Depths
description: You have resistance to cold damage and ignore drawbacks caused by deep underwater environments.

name: Long-Limbed
description: When you make a melee attack on your turn, your reach is 5 feet greater than normal.

name: Sneaky
description: You have proficiency in the Stealth skill.

name: Surprise Attack
description: You deal extra damage when you hit a surprised creature on the first round of combat.

name: Fury of the Small
description: Once per short or long rest, you can deal extra damage to a creature larger than you.

name: Nimble Escape
description: You can take the Disengage or Hide action as a bonus action on each of your turns.

name: Martial Training
description: You are proficient with two martial weapons of your choice and with light armor.

name: Saving Face
description: When you miss with an attack roll or fail an ability check or saving throw, you can gain a bonus based on nearby allies once per short or long rest.

name: Grovel, Cower, and Beg
description: As an action, distract nearby foes, granting your allies an opening.

name: Pack Tactics
description: You have advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one ally is adjacent to it and isn't incapacitated.

name: Aggressive
description: As a bonus action, you can move up to your speed toward a hostile creature you can see.

name: Innate Spellcasting
description: Your serpentine heritage grants you innate spellcasting.

name: Magic Resistance
description: You have advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

name: Poison Immunity
description: You are immune to poison damage and the poisoned condition.
